ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Trunkbox,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on cd5743.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hi Team Trunkbox,

Thank you for your time over the call.

Apologies for the earlier delay—your query was in our suspended queue. If possible, could you please use a different email for future correspondence to avoid this?

Regarding your Blue Dart credentials, I have reached out to the Blue Dart team and have cc’d you in the email as well. We are currently awaiting their response.

Thank you for your patience, and we’ll keep you updated.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Team Trunkbox,
 
Thank you for your time over the call.
 
Apologies for the earlier delay—your query was in our suspended queue. If possible, could you please use a different email for future correspondence to avoid this?
 
Regarding your Blue Dart credentials, I have reached out to the Blue Dart team and have cc’d you in the email as well. We are currently awaiting their response.
 
Thank you for your patience, and we’ll keep you updated.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
India store
bluedart added
238 orders
I spoke with the customer and offered assistance.
Requested a customer for a zoom call and joined
Call summary: Customer ships about 100 orders in a month, I assisted with basis set up and explained the app functionalities.
However the labels were failing with the error " User not authorized to register pickup for specified Area Customer code"
I checked with Abhilash, and he shared a BD support I reached out to him on  : https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/382820

Mail sent , keeping it open as we are awating response from BD team
